languages.text: {n}Спустя мгновение склонившиеся над пациентом специалисты одновременно поднимают инструменты вверх. Бесцветный голос техножреца провозглашает: {/n} "Фиксирую полную стабилизацию состояния. Внутренние повреждения коры обработаны. Запрашиваю закрытие калотты и перевод пострадавшего на стимуляторы Б-класса".

traits.locale_text: {n}Спустя мгновения медикарии одновременно поднимают вверх разномастные руки. Механически-бесцветный голос техножреца разрезает тишину. {/n}"Фиксирую стабилизацию состояния. Внутренние ожоги коры обработаны. Запрашиваю закрытие калотты и перевод пациента на стимуляторы Б-класса".

languages.text: {n}A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments. In a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the life form's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."
languages.original_text: {n}Спустя мгновение склонившиеся над пациентом специалисты одновременно поднимают инструменты вверх. Бесцветный голос техножреца провозглашает: {/n} "Фиксирую полную стабилизацию состояния. Внутренние повреждения коры обработаны. Запрашиваю закрытие калотты и перевод пострадавшего на стимуляторы Б-класса".

traits.locale_text: {n}A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments. In a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the unit's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulators."

{n}A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments. In a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the unit's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulators."

{n}A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments. In a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the unit's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulators."

languages.text: {n}一瞬後、患者に身を乗り出していた二人が同時に器具を持ち上げる。抑揚のない声でテックプリーストが告げた。{/n}「ユニットの状態の完全な安定化を記録。大脳皮質内部の損傷は処置済み。骨弁の閉鎖と被害者のB級刺激装置への移送を要請する」
languages.original_text: {n}A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments. In a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the unit's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulators."

traits.locale_text: {n}一瞬後、患者に身を乗り出していた二人が同時に器具を持ち上げる。抑揚のない声でテックプリーストが告げた。{/n}「ユニットの状態の完全な安定化を記録。大脳皮質内部の損傷は処置済み。骨弁の閉鎖と被害者のB級刺激装置への移送を要請する。」

languages.text: {n}Un instant plus tard, les deux soignants penchés sur le patient lèvent simultanément leurs instruments. D'une voix monocorde, le technoprêtre déclare :{/n} « Confirmation de la stabilisation complète de l'état de l'entité. Les dégâts corticaux internes ont été traités. Demande de fermeture de la calotte et d'administration de stimulants de classe B à la victime. »
languages.original_text: {n}A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments. In a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the life form's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un instant plus tard, les deux soignants penchés sur le patient lèvent simultanément leurs instruments. D'une voix monocorde, le technoprêtre déclare :{/n} « Confirmation de la stabilisation complète de l'état de l'entité. Les dégâts corticaux internes ont été traités. Demande de fermeture de la calotte et d'administration de stimulants de classe B à la victime. »

languages.text: {n}Bir an sonra hastanın üzerine eğilen iki kişi, aynı anda aletlerini kaldırıyor. Tekno Rahip, renksiz bir sesle konuşuyor.{/n} "Yaşam formunun durumunun tamamen stabilize olduğunu kaydediyorum. İç zihinsel hasarı giderildi. Kafatasının üst bölümünün kapatılmasını ve kurbanın B sınıfı uyarıcıya naklini talep ediyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments. In a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the life form's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."

traits.locale_text: {n}Bir an sonra hastanın üzerine eğilen iki kişi, aynı anda aletlerini kaldırıyor. Tekno Rahip, renksiz bir sesle konuşuyor.{/n} "Yaşam formunun durumunun tamamen stabilize olduğunu kaydediyorum. İç zihinsel hasarı giderildi. Kafatasının üst bölümünün kapatılmasını ve kurbanın B sınıfı uyarıcıya naklini talep ediyorum."

languages.text: {n}Einen Augenblick später heben die beiden über ihn gebeugten Personen gleichzeitig ihre Instrumente. Der Techpriester erklärt mit ausdrucksloser Stimme:{/n} "Registriere die vollständige Stabilisierung des Zustandes der Lebensform. Interner Kortikalschaden wurde behandelt. Erbitte Schließung der Kalotte und die Infusion von Klasse-B-Stimulanzien."
languages.original_text: {n}A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments. In a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the life form's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."

traits.locale_text: {n}Einen Augenblick später heben die beiden über ihn gebeugten Personen gleichzeitig ihre Instrumente. Der Techpriester erklärt mit ausdrucksloser Stimme:{/n} "Registriere die vollständige Stabilisierung des Zustandes der Lebensform. Interner Kortikalschaden wurde behandelt. Erbitte Schließung der Kalotte und die Infusion von Klasse-B-Stimulanzien."

languages.text: {n}Un momento después, las dos personas que se inclinan sobre el paciente levantan su instrumental al mismo tiempo. Con voz neutra, el tecnosacerdote proclama:{/n} «Registrando la estabilización completa del estado de la forma de vida. El daño cortical interno está tratado. Solicitando el cierre del cráneo y el paso de la víctima a los estimulantes de clase B».
languages.original_text: {n}A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments. In a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the life form's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un momento después, las dos personas que se inclinan sobre el paciente levantan su instrumental al mismo tiempo. Con voz neutra, el tecnosacerdote proclama:{/n} «Registrando la estabilización completa del estado de la forma de vida. El daño cortical interno está tratado. Solicitando el cierre del cráneo y el paso de la víctima a los estimulantes de clase B».

languages.text: {n}片刻之后，俯身在病人上方的两人同时抬起了手中的器械。技术神甫用一种毫无起伏的声音宣布，{/n}“记录到该生命体状况已完全稳定。内部皮层损伤已处理。请求关闭颅顶并转为B级兴奋剂治疗。”
languages.original_text: {n}A moment later, the two people leaning over the patient simultaneously raise their instruments. In a colourless voice, the Tech-Priest proclaims,{/n} "Registering the complete stabilisation of the life form's condition. Internal cortical damage has been treated. Requesting closure of the calotte and transfer of the victim to B-class stimulants."

traits.locale_text: {n}片刻之后，俯身在病人上方的两人同时抬起了手中的器械。技术神甫用一种毫无起伏的声音宣布，{/n}“记录到该生命体状况已完全稳定。内部皮层损伤已处理。请求关闭颅顶并转为B级兴奋剂治疗。”
